philosophy.notes: Dual-personality approach correctly translates Zomato (editorial maroon, slower, curated) and Swiggy (saffron kinetic, faster, dispatch) without literal brand colors. Atmosphere reads as luxury dispatch lounge, not delivery app.

hierarchy.notes: Hero headline anchors first. Platform cards are the clear primary interaction (most visually differentiated section). Supporting sections recede appropriately. One focal point per section.

typography.notes: Playfair Display for headings gives heritage weight. Inter for body keeps readability. Generous leading (1.6+) at body sizes. Tight tracking on display sizes (-1.8px). Consistent hierarchy.

motion.notes: Scroll reveals via IntersectionObserver with staggered delays. Platform-specific timing (700ms Zomato vs 500ms Swiggy) is subtle but intentional. Hover lifts + shadow intensification. prefers-reduced-motion respected.

brand.notes: Strict 5-color palette enforced. No external colors. Platform personalities expressed through maroon vs saffron families only. Heritage arch framing + film grain + vignette maintain existing brand atmosphere.
